mapper.select: SELECT csp_instanceid AS instanceId, COALESCE(NULLIF(vm_nm, ''), mci_nm) AS name, csp_type AS csp, CASE WHEN instance_running_status = 'Y' THEN 'running' ELSE 'stopped' END AS status, vm_id AS vmId, mci_id AS mciId, service_cd AS nsId FROM servicegroup_meta WHERE service_cd = #{nsId} ORDER BY csp_instanceid
